description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a metallic head. The head is composed of a flat striking face on one side and a sharply curved claw on the opposite side, designed for pulling nails. The handle is smooth, light brown, and ergonomically contoured for a comfortable grip, tapering slightly towards the end. The metallic head is finished in a matte black, contrasting with the natural wood of the handle. The hammer appears clean and well-crafted, with no visible signs of wear or branding. Its proportions and materials suggest it is suitable for general carpentry or household tasks in urban environments.
description: A classic claw hammer with a smooth wooden handle and a matte black metal head, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the wooden handle and the distinct shape of the claw and striking face.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow width of the hammer head and the handle, with the striking face visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the curvature of the claw and the straightness of the handle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the split of the claw and the alignment of the handle with the head.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, smooth, slightly contoured for ergonomic grip
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a sharply curved claw for nail removal, made of steel
